batch.schedulingpolicy.CfnAbout: The `AWS::Batch::SchedulingPolicy` resource specifies the parameters for an AWS Batch scheduling policy. For more information, see [Scheduling Policies](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/batch/latest/userguide/scheduling_policies.html) in the *AWS Batch User Guide*.

batch.schedulingpolicy.FairsharePolicy.Description: The fair share policy of the scheduling policy.

batch.schedulingpolicy.Name.Description: The name of the scheduling policy. It can be up to 128 letters long. It can contain uppercase and lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens (-), and underscores (_).

batch.schedulingpolicy.Tags.Description: The tags that you apply to the scheduling policy to help you categorize and organize your resources. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value. For more information, see [Tagging AWS Resources](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/aws_tagging.html) in * AWS General Reference*.  These tags can be updated or removed using the [TagResource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/batch/latest/APIReference/API_TagResource.html) and [UntagResource](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/batch/latest/APIReference/API_UntagResource.html) API operations.
